name: Fire Bee
description: A Vladof area grenade that combines a rotating ring of fire with outward-fanning incendiary projectiles. It is especially good at softening up or clearing unarmoured groups that stay inside the effect.
notes:
It uses a fixed incendiary accessory and the Exterminator area-effect payload. Storm Front and Pandemic share that payload, but each behaves differently because their balance data is separate.

Unlike those two, Fire Bee has no dedicated drop source.

special.description: Always incendiary. On detonation it creates a rotating ring of fire and launches multiple small fire missiles outward, with each missile exploding on contact.
special.title: Bees are coming!
